mapper.sql: select prod_id, prod_name, prod_desc, prod_img, prod_price, prod_text, order_num, prod_status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, delete_at, prod_code from cafe_production
mapper.select: where prod_id = #{prodId} and delete_at IS NULL
mapper.insert:
insert into cafe_production
prod_name, prod_desc, prod_img, prod_price, prod_text, order_num, prod_status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, delete_at,
prod_code,
#{prodName}, #{prodDesc}, #{prodImg}, #{prodPrice}, #{prodText}, #{orderNum}, #{prodStatus}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{deleteAt},
#{prodCode},

insert into cafe_production
prod_name, prod_desc, prod_img, prod_price, prod_text, order_num, prod_status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, delete_at, prod_code,
values
(
#{item.prodName}, #{item.prodDesc}, #{item.prodImg}, #{item.prodPrice}, #{item.prodText}, #{item.orderNum}, #{item.prodStatus}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateBy}, #{item.updateTime}, #{item.deleteAt}, #{item.prodCode},
)

insert ignore into cafe_production
prod_name, prod_desc, prod_img, prod_price, prod_text, order_num, prod_status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, delete_at, prod_code,
values
(
#{item.prodName}, #{item.prodDesc}, #{item.prodImg}, #{item.prodPrice}, #{item.prodText}, #{item.orderNum}, #{item.prodStatus}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateBy}, #{item.updateTime}, #{item.deleteAt}, #{item.prodCode},
)
mapper.update:
update cafe_production
prod_name = #{prodName}, prod_desc = #{prodDesc}, prod_img = #{prodImg}, prod_price = #{prodPrice}, prod_text = #{prodText}, order_num = #{orderNum}, prod_status = #{prodStatus}, create_by = #{createBy}, create_time = #{createTime}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime}, delete_at = #{deleteAt},
prod_code = #{prodCode},
where prod_id = #{prodId} and delete_at IS NULL

update.foreach:
update cafe_production
prod_name = #{item.prodName}, prod_desc = #{item.prodDesc}, prod_img = #{item.prodImg}, prod_price = #{item.prodPrice}, prod_text = #{item.prodText}, order_num = #{item.orderNum}, prod_status = #{item.prodStatus}, create_by = #{item.createBy}, create_time = #{item.createTime}, update_by = #{item.updateBy}, update_time = #{item.updateTime}, delete_at = #{item.deleteAt},
prod_code = #{item.prodCode},
where prod_id = #{item.prodId} and delete_at IS NULL

mapper.update: update cafe_production set delete_at = now() where prod_id = #{prodId} and delete_at IS NULL
